expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子板材尺寸。[Width], [Height], [Depth] 是总尺寸，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧面板材厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背板厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah jumlah ukuran, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan papan atas, bawah, dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดรวม, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นไม้ด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นไม้ด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu ván trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu ván phía sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga laki ng board para sa isang kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Sukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyales ng Tip, Ibaba at Side Board, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyales ng Background Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အိပ်အိုစုဆောင်းဿကတမ်း (AI translated, please check ILattice)
remarks.km: គណនាទំហំបន្ទះសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាវិមាត្រូសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាភាពរឹងមាំនៃផ្ទាំងក្តារខាងលើ, ខាងក្រោមនិងក្តារចំហៀង [BackBoardThick] គឺជាភាពរឹងបងរបស់ផ្ទាំងផ្ទៃខាងក្រោយ។
